_meta.description: US Bird DrillForge — common North American birds by region. Media via Wikimedia Commons (Special:FilePath).
_meta.media_note: Images and audio load from Wikimedia Commons. Attribution shown on each bird detail.

birds.habitat: Woodland edges, gardens, thickets, suburbs
birds.field_marks: Male vivid red with black face mask and thick orange-red bill; female warm brown with red wash on wings/tail and same bill; both have a pointed crest.
birds.call_description: Loud clear whistles: what-cheer, cheer, cheer or birdie-birdie-birdie; sharp metallic chip.

birds.habitat: Lawns, parks, woodland edges, gardens
birds.field_marks: Gray-brown above, brick-red breast, white lower belly, broken white eye-ring, yellow bill; runs and pauses on lawns.
birds.call_description: Cheerily cheer-up cheerio song at dawn; sharp tut-tut or peek alarm calls.

birds.habitat: Deciduous and mixed woods, parks, feeders
birds.field_marks: Bright blue upperparts, white face with black necklace, crest, white wing bars; large and bold at feeders.
birds.call_description: Loud jaay jaay; liquid toolool; mimics hawk screams.

birds.habitat: Open country, towns, farms, woodlands
birds.field_marks: All black with stout bill; squared tail in flight; larger than most songbirds, smaller than raven.
birds.call_description: Familiar caw-caw; variety of rattles and clicks in flocks.

birds.habitat: Deciduous and mixed woods, feeders, parks
birds.field_marks: Black cap and bib, white cheeks, soft gray back, buffy flanks; tiny and acrobatic.
birds.call_description: Name-saying chick-a-dee-dee-dee; clear fee-bee whistle song.

birds.habitat: Deciduous woods, parks, feeders
birds.field_marks: Gray above, whitish below, rusty flanks, pointed crest, black forehead patch, large dark eye.
birds.call_description: Clear peter-peter-peter song; nasal scolds.

birds.habitat: Mature deciduous woods, parks, feeders
birds.field_marks: Blue-gray back, white face and underparts, black cap (male), climbs head-down on trunks; short tail.
birds.call_description: Nasal yank yank; rapid soft song.

birds.habitat: Woods, parks, orchards, feeders
birds.field_marks: Smallest woodpecker: black-and-white checkered, white back stripe; male has small red nape patch; short bill vs. Hairy.
birds.call_description: Soft pik; descending whinny; gentle drumming.

birds.habitat: Hardwood forests, suburbs, feeders
birds.field_marks: Zebra-barred back, pale face and underparts; male red crown to nape, female red nape only; faint pinkish belly hard to see.
birds.call_description: Rolling churr or quirr; loud chuck.

birds.habitat: Open woods, parks, lawns, edges
birds.field_marks: Brown barred back, black-spotted belly, black bib; white rump in flight; yellow or red underwings (East vs West); often feeds on ground for ants.
birds.call_description: Loud wick-a-wick-a-wick; piercing kee-yer; long drum rolls.

birds.habitat: Open country, suburbs, farms, wires
birds.field_marks: Slender tan dove with long pointed tail edged white; black spots on wings; small head.
birds.call_description: Soft mournful coo-OO-oo-oo-oo; whistling wings on takeoff.

birds.habitat: Cities, suburbs, feeders, open country
birds.field_marks: Male red on head/breast/rump (can be orange/yellow); female streaky brown; notched tail; thick seed-eating bill.
birds.call_description: Cheerful warbling song with burry notes; sweet cheep flight call.

birds.habitat: Weedy fields, feeders, roadsides, open woods
birds.field_marks: Breeding male bright yellow with black cap and black-and-white wings; female duller olive-yellow; undulating flight.
birds.call_description: Per-chick-o-ree or po-ta-to-chip in flight; sweet warbling song.

birds.habitat: Woods, edges, winter feeders, conifers in summer
birds.field_marks: Variable: slate-colored form is dark gray with white belly and white outer tail feathers; pink bill; hops on ground.
birds.call_description: Musical trill song; sharp tick or smack call; twittering flight notes.

birds.habitat: Brushy edges, marshes, gardens, streams
birds.field_marks: Streaky brown; central breast spot; long rounded tail pumped in flight; grayish face with brown stripes.
birds.call_description: Complex song starting with 2–3 clear notes then trill/buzz; sharp chimp call.

birds.habitat: Brushy woods, edges; winter under feeders
birds.field_marks: White throat patch, yellow lores, striped crown (white- or tan-striped morphs), gray breast, rusty wings.
birds.call_description: Clear Oh-sweet-Canada-Canada or Old-Sam-Peabody song; sharp chink call.

birds.habitat: Marshes, wet fields, roadsides, cattails
birds.field_marks: Male glossy black with red-and-yellow shoulder patches; female heavily streaked brown; often in flocks.
birds.call_description: Conk-la-ree song; sharp check calls.

birds.habitat: Lawns, parks, farms, suburbs, wetlands
birds.field_marks: Long keel-shaped tail, pale yellow eye, iridescent purple-bronze head; larger and lankier than blackbirds.
birds.call_description: Harsh readle-eak or squeaky rusty-hinge song; loud chuck.

birds.habitat: Cities, farms, parks, lawns — nearly everywhere
birds.field_marks: Stocky, short tail, pointed yellow bill in breeding season; glossy iridescent black with speckles in winter; triangular wings in flight.
birds.call_description: Mimicry-rich warbles, whistles, clicks, and rattles; often mimics other birds.

birds.habitat: Cities, farms, buildings, parking lots
birds.field_marks: Male gray crown, black bib, chestnut nape; female plain sandy brown with pale eyebrow; always near people.
birds.call_description: Constant cheep and chirrup chatter; no musical song.

birds.habitat: Open woods, parks, shade trees, orchards
birds.field_marks: Male flame orange and black with white wing bars; female yellow-orange and gray-olive; pointed bill.
birds.call_description: Rich flute-like whistled phrases; chatter call.

birds.habitat: Open fields with perches, orchards, nest boxes
birds.field_marks: Male sky-blue above with rusty throat/breast; female grayer blue with softer rust; sits upright on wires and fences.
birds.call_description: Soft musical chur-lee or truly-aloo; gentle tu-a-wee calls.

birds.habitat: Fruiting trees, edges, orchards, suburbs
birds.field_marks: Sleek crested bird, silky brown, yellow belly tip, black mask, red wax-like wing tips, yellow tail tip; often in flocks.
birds.call_description: High thin seee or sreee; no real song; twittering flocks.

birds.habitat: Gardens, feeders, woodland edges, flowers
birds.field_marks: Tiny; male emerald green with ruby-red throat that can look black; female green above, white below with white throat; needle bill.
birds.call_description: Rapid chip calls; male dive display with buzzing wing trill.

birds.habitat: Marshes, rivers, lakes, coasts, ponds
birds.field_marks: Huge gray-blue wader, long S-curved neck, dagger bill, black stripe over eye; slow wingbeats with neck tucked in flight.
birds.call_description: Deep harsh frahnk or squawk when disturbed.

birds.habitat: Ponds, parks, marshes, rivers, lakes
birds.field_marks: Male green head, yellow bill, white neck ring, chestnut breast; female mottled brown with orange bill marked dark; blue speculum bordered white.
birds.call_description: Female classic loud quack series; male softer reeb.

birds.habitat: Lakes, parks, lawns, fields, wetlands
birds.field_marks: Black head and neck with white chinstrap, brown body, pale breast; large and often in V-formation flocks.
birds.call_description: Loud resonant honk; clucks and hisses near nest.

birds.habitat: Lakes, rivers, coasts with large trees
birds.field_marks: Adult white head and tail, dark brown body, huge yellow bill; immature mottled brown for several years; massive raptor.
birds.call_description: High thin chatter or giggle — weaker than expected for size.

birds.habitat: Open country, highways, woods edges, fields
birds.field_marks: Broad wings, short wide tail; adult usually rusty-red upper tail; pale breast with dark belly band common in East; soars in circles.
birds.call_description: Classic descending keeeeeeer scream (often used in movies for any hawk/eagle).

birds.habitat: Woods, deserts, parks, suburbs, cliffs
birds.field_marks: Large owl with ear tufts, yellow eyes, white throat bib, barred underparts; bulky silhouette at dusk.
birds.call_description: Deep hoo-h'HOO-hoo-hoo territorial hoot; various barks and screeches.

birds.habitat: Mature woods, swamps, riparian forest
birds.field_marks: Round head no ear tufts, dark eyes, horizontal barring on neck, vertical streaks on belly; gray-brown overall.
birds.call_description: Who-cooks-for-you, who-cooks-for-you-all; also wild caterwauling pairs.

birds.habitat: Suburbs, parks, thickets, open country
birds.field_marks: Gray with long tail, white wing patches flash in flight; slender bill; bold and territorial.
birds.call_description: Long mimicry medleys repeating phrases 3+ times; harsh chak.

birds.habitat: Brush piles, thickets, yards, wood edges
birds.field_marks: Rich rusty brown, bold white eyebrow, slightly curved bill, cocked tail; loud for size.
birds.call_description: Tea-kettle tea-kettle tea-kettle or cheery-cheery-cheery; scolding rattles.

birds.habitat: Mature forests with large dead trees
birds.field_marks: Crow-sized black woodpecker with flaming red crest, white neck stripes; male has red malar; rectangular excavations.
birds.call_description: Loud kuk-kuk-kuk-kuk rising then falling; powerful drumming; wuk-wuk flight call.

birds.habitat: Woods, edges, fields, open forest
birds.field_marks: Huge dark gamebird; male iridescent with bare blue/red head, beard; female smaller duller; fan tail in display.
birds.call_description: Male gobble; clucks, putts, yelps, and kee-kee from hens/young.

birds.habitat: Wetlands, prairies, fields, migration stopovers
birds.field_marks: Tall gray crane with red forehead, long dark bill, long neck; flies with neck outstretched (unlike herons).
birds.call_description: Loud rattling bugling kar-r-r-o-o-o audible for miles.

birds.habitat: Fields, gravel lots, shorelines, golf courses
birds.field_marks: Brown above, white below, two black breast bands, orange rump/tail in flight; runs then freezes.
birds.call_description: Piercing kill-deer or dee-ee; broken-wing distraction display.

birds.habitat: Marshes, ponds, coasts, wetlands
birds.field_marks: All-white large heron, long S-neck, yellow bill, black legs/feet; breeding plumes on back.
birds.call_description: Low croaks and squawks at colony; mostly silent when feeding.

birds.habitat: Rivers, lakes, coasts with clear water and perches
birds.field_marks: Shaggy crest, large bill, blue-gray above, white collar; female has rusty belly band; hovers then dives.
birds.call_description: Loud dry rattle flight call.

birds.habitat: Open fields near water, nest boxes, marshes
birds.field_marks: Iridescent blue-green above, pure white below; long pointed wings; graceful aerial insectivore.
birds.call_description: Liquid chirps and twitters; chatter near nest boxes.

birds.habitat: Farms, bridges, open country, near structures
birds.field_marks: Steel-blue back, rusty throat, buff belly, deeply forked long tail streamers; nests of mud on buildings.
birds.call_description: Cheerful twittering song; sharp vit or chi-dit calls in flight.

birds.habitat: Willows, wet thickets, gardens, stream edges
birds.field_marks: Overall bright yellow; male has rusty breast streaks; round head, thin bill; no wing bars.
birds.call_description: Sweet sweet sweet I'm so sweet song; soft chip call.

birds.habitat: Deciduous woods, second growth, edges
birds.field_marks: Male black with bright orange patches on sides, wings, tail; female gray-olive with yellow patches; fans tail often.
birds.call_description: High variable song, often zee zee zee zoo; sharp chip.

birds.habitat: Brushy fields, roadsides, power lines, edges
birds.field_marks: Breeding male brilliant all-blue (can look black in poor light); female plain brown; conical bill; sings from high perch.
birds.call_description: Cheerful paired phrases: fire-fire, where-where, here-here; sharp spit call.

birds.habitat: Mature deciduous forest canopy
birds.field_marks: Breeding male scarlet with jet-black wings and tail; female olive-yellow with darker wings; often high in trees.
birds.call_description: Robin-like but hoarser chick-burr song; distinctive chick-burr call.

birds.habitat: Grasslands, prairies, pastures, fields
birds.field_marks: Chunky with long bill, bright yellow underparts, black V on breast, streaked brown back; short tail with white outer feathers.
birds.call_description: Flute-like gurgling song, richer than Eastern; chuck call.

birds.habitat: Fields, pastures, grasslands, airports
birds.field_marks: Very similar to Western: yellow breast with black V, streaked brown; best told by song and range.
birds.call_description: Clear simple whistled see-you see-yeeer; dzert call.

birds.habitat: Deserts, scrub, open arid country
birds.field_marks: Long-legged ground cuckoo, streaked brown, bushy crest, long tail, strong bill; runs more than flies.
birds.call_description: Slow descending cooing; bill clacks; dove-like series.

birds.habitat: Desert scrub, washes, suburbs with cover
birds.field_marks: Plump; black forward-curving topknot plume; male black face with white outline, chestnut crown, scaled belly.
birds.call_description: Chi-CA-go assembly call; various clucks.

birds.habitat: Deserts with cholla, yucca, thorny scrub
birds.field_marks: Largest US wren; heavily spotted breast, bold white eyebrow, long barred tail; noisy and conspicuous.
birds.call_description: Harsh unmusical chug-chug-chug-chug like a car that won't start.

birds.habitat: Gardens, coastal scrub, chaparral, feeders
birds.field_marks: Male rose-red crown and throat (gorget) can look black; green body; year-round on West Coast; larger than Ruby-throated.
birds.call_description: Scratchy song of buzzes and chips from perch; explosive dive display with squeak.

birds.habitat: Coniferous and mixed forests of the West
birds.field_marks: Dark blue body, blackish head and tall crest; white streaks on forehead; no white face like Blue Jay.
birds.call_description: Harsh shaack shaack; varied whistles; mimics hawks.

birds.habitat: Oak woodland, scrub, suburbs, chaparral
birds.field_marks: Blue without crest, gray-brown back, white throat with incomplete blue necklace; bold and loud.
birds.call_description: Harsh shreeenk or weep-weep; various scolds.

birds.habitat: Open country with trees, ranchland, towns in West
birds.field_marks: Striking black-and-white with very long tail, iridescent green-purple wings; unmistakable in western open country.
birds.call_description: Rapid mag mag mag chatter; harsh querulous calls.

birds.habitat: Open country, high meadows, ranchland, nest boxes
birds.field_marks: Male sky-blue all over, paler below; female gray-brown with blue on wings/tail; longer-winged than Eastern Bluebird.
birds.call_description: Soft warbled song; low chur calls.

birds.habitat: Dense brush, chaparral, forest understory
birds.field_marks: Male black hood and back with white wing spots, rufous sides, white belly; red eye; scratches loudly in leaf litter.
birds.call_description: Catlike mew call; buzzy trill song.

birds.habitat: Chaparral, oak woodlands, suburbs, brush
birds.field_marks: Forward-drooping black topknot; male black face with white stripes, scaled belly; often in coveys.
birds.call_description: Chi-CA-go assembly call (similar to Gambel's); soft clucks.

birds.habitat: Coasts, bays, piers, beaches
birds.field_marks: Huge coastal bird with massive bill and throat pouch; gray-brown; dives headfirst for fish; immature browner.
birds.call_description: Mostly silent; low grunts at colonies.

birds.habitat: Atlantic and Gulf coasts, beaches, marshes
birds.field_marks: Breeding adult black head, dark red bill, gray back, white body; immature mottled; coastal.
birds.call_description: Loud laughing ha-ha-ha-haa; nasal calls.

birds.habitat: Brushy areas, woodland edges, feeders in South
birds.field_marks: Male looks painted: blue head, green back, red underparts; female bright green; secretive in brush.
birds.call_description: Sweet warbling song; sharp chip call.

birds.habitat: Coastal marshes, mangroves, shallow wetlands of South
birds.field_marks: Unmistakable pink wader with long spoon-shaped bill; pale head; often with egrets in Florida/Gulf.
birds.call_description: Low grunts and clucks at colonies; mostly quiet.

birds.habitat: Wooded swamps, ponds, rivers with trees
birds.field_marks: Male ornate: iridescent greens/purples, red eye and bill, white face stripes; female gray with white eye-ring and teardrop; nests in cavities.
birds.call_description: Male thin rising jeee; female loud oo-eek when flushed.

birds.habitat: Northern lakes in summer; coastal waters in winter
birds.field_marks: Breeding: black head, checkered black-white back, red eye; dagger bill held level; sits low in water.
birds.call_description: Haunting wail, yodel, and tremolo laughs across lakes.

birds.habitat: Lakes, rivers, coasts — anywhere with fish
birds.field_marks: Dark brown above, white below, dark eye stripe, crooked wings in flight (M-shape); dives feet-first for fish.
birds.call_description: High whistled kyew kyew kyew; chirps near nest.

birds.habitat: Open country, roadsides, skies almost anywhere
birds.field_marks: Large dark soaring bird; red naked head (adult); two-tone underwings (silver flight feathers); teeters in V dihedral.
birds.call_description: Mostly silent; hisses and grunts at carcass/nest.

birds.habitat: Open fields, highways, farmlands, edges
birds.field_marks: Smallest falcon; rusty back/tail, two black face slashes; male blue-gray wings; often hovers over fields.
birds.call_description: Rapid high klee-klee-klee or killy-killy-killy.

birds.habitat: Marshes, prairies, open fields
birds.field_marks: Long wings and tail, white rump patch; male gray, female/immature brown; flies low with wings in V, owl-like face disk.
birds.call_description: High pee pee pee near nest; mostly quiet when hunting.

birds.habitat: Marshes, mudflats, coasts, wetlands
birds.field_marks: Medium white heron, black bill, black legs, bright yellow feet (golden slippers); active feeder stirring water.
birds.call_description: Harsh squawks; mostly quiet when feeding.

birds.habitat: Lakes, rivers, coasts, reservoirs
birds.field_marks: Dark diving bird with hooked bill, orange throat patch; often perches with wings spread to dry; swims low.
birds.call_description: Low grunts at colonies; quiet away from nest.

birds.habitat: Bottomland woods, swamps, suburban woodlots
birds.field_marks: Banded black-and-white tail, rufous shoulders and barred rusty breast; translucent crescents near wingtips in flight.
birds.call_description: Loud screaming kee-aah repeated; very vocal.

birds.habitat: Woods, suburbs, often near bird feeders
birds.field_marks: Accipiter: long tail, short rounded wings; adult gray back, rusty barred breast, dark cap; hunts birds at feeders.
birds.call_description: Rapid kak-kak-kak near nest; usually silent when hunting.

birds.habitat: Conifers in summer; woods and thickets on migration/winter
birds.field_marks: Tiny olive-gray, broken white eye-ring, two white wing bars; male's red crown patch usually hidden; constant wing flicking.
birds.call_description: Remarkably loud complex warbling song for size; dry ji-dit call.

birds.habitat: Coniferous forests; mixed woods in winter
birds.field_marks: Tiny; bold black-and-white face stripes; orange (male) or yellow (female) crown stripe; olive body.
birds.call_description: High thin see-see-see song; very high tsee calls hard for some to hear.

birds.habitat: Near bridges, barns, woodland edges, streams
birds.field_marks: Drab gray-brown flycatcher, darkest on head, no wing bars, no eye-ring; constantly pumps tail; nests on buildings.
birds.call_description: Emphatic fee-bee song; sharp chip call.

birds.habitat: Open country with perches, fields, roadsides
birds.field_marks: Blackish above, white below, white tail tip band; aggressive toward larger birds; upright posture on wires.
birds.call_description: High buzzy kit-kit-kittery song; sharp dzeet calls.

birds.habitat: Open country, ranchland, utility wires, deserts edges
birds.field_marks: Gray head, yellow belly, dark tail with white outer edges (not white tip like Eastern); black bill.
birds.call_description: Sharp kit and chattering bickering calls; aggressive.

birds.habitat: Desert riparian, streams, open scrub in Southwest
birds.field_marks: Male brilliant red with dark brown mask and back; female gray-brown with peachy belly and streaked breast.
birds.call_description: Soft pitty-see song; sharp peep calls.

birds.habitat: Ponds, marshes, streams with cover
birds.field_marks: Small stocky heron; dark greenish back, chestnut neck, short yellow legs; often crouches at water's edge; can use bait.
birds.call_description: Sharp skeow or kyow when flushed.

birds.habitat: Wetlands, shores, urban ponds; active at dusk
birds.field_marks: Stocky; black cap and back, gray wings, white underparts, red eye, short neck; immature streaky brown.
birds.call_description: Loud quark or wok flight call at dusk.

birds.habitat: Skies over towns and woods; nests in chimneys
birds.field_marks: Flying cigar: dark, stiff rapid wingbeats, short square tail, never perches on wires; only in air or inside chimney.
birds.call_description: Rapid high chippering twitter in flight.

birds.habitat: Open skies at dusk, cities, fields, clearings
birds.field_marks: Cryptic brown; long pointed wings with white bar visible in flight; falcon-like but buoyant; active at dusk.
birds.call_description: Nasal peent flight call; male booming dive display.

birds.habitat: Open country near martin houses, water
birds.field_marks: Largest swallow; male glossy blue-black all over; female duller gray belly; nests in colonies in boxes.
birds.call_description: Rich gurgling chortles and croaks; liquid song.
